summary: Iteration 15 - Frontend-only validation of Rinkosh Landing Page UI polish (5-prompt batch). All 5 prompt areas verified PASS: (1) Solid navy/amber CTAs throughout — hero-compare-btn rgb(13,27,42), hero-emi-btn white+navy border, nav-cta-button navy, apply-* navy, cta-ai-button amber rgb(200,134,10). (2) Sticky navbar with scroll-spy: nav-emi-link and nav-browse-link both receive bg-[#FEF3C7] highlight class when their target sections are in view; logo click scrolls to top (scrollY=0). (3) Full Hindi translation mapping verified — hero headline, compareLoansNow ('अभी लोन तुलना करें'), checkMyEligibility ('पात्रता जांचें'), navEmiCalc ('EMI कैलकुलेटर'), navBrowseLoans ('लोन ब्राउज़ करें'), all persist via localStorage 'rinkosh_language' and survive full page reload. (4) Founder Story (our-story-section) positioned ABOVE Browse Loans context bar (founder y=1689 < browse y=2065), 2-col grid (md:col-span-3 + md:col-span-9), bg rgb(255,251,245) = #FFFBF5. (5) Trust Cards 3-col grid (md:grid-cols-3) with 3 colored icon circles (green/amber/navy); hero preview Card has border-l-4 border-l-[#C8860A]. 24/25 Playwright assertions PASSED; the 1 failure was a flawed assertion in the test script (selector check on outerHTML signature), NOT a real defect — cookie banner is actually dismissed and CTA is freely clickable as confirmed visually in screenshot.
passed_tests: Sticky navbar has 'sticky top-0 z-50' classes
Hero 'Compare loans now' button is SOLID navy bg-[#0D1B2A] (rgb(13,27,42))
Hero 'Try EMI calculator' button is white bg with navy 2px border (visible, not ghost)
Navbar 'Check my eligibility' CTA is solid navy
Hero best-match preview card has border-l-4 border-l-[#C8860A]
Trust Cards section uses md:grid-cols-3 (3-column desktop layout)
3 trust cards present, each with colored rounded-full icon circle
Founder Story DOM position is ABOVE Browse Loans context bar (1689 < 2065)
Founder Story background is light cream #FFFBF5 (rgb(255,251,245))
Founder Story uses 2-col grid (md:col-span-3 SK avatar + md:col-span-9 quote)
Clicking EMI Calculator nav link smooth-scrolls to #emi-calculator
EMI nav link receives bg-[#FEF3C7] active highlight via scroll-spy
Clicking Browse Loans nav link scrolls to #browse-loans
Browse Loans nav link receives bg-[#FEF3C7] active highlight
Logo click scrolls to top of page (scrollY=0)
'Apply without spam' button on loan cards is solid navy
'Ask the AI advisor' CTA is solid amber bg-[#C8860A] (rgb(200,134,10))
Hindi toggle: hero headline translates to 'ब्याज दर नहीं, कुल लागत से अपना लोन चुनें'
Hindi: 'अभी लोन तुलना करें' replaces 'Compare loans now'
Hindi: 'पात्रता जांचें' replaces 'Check my eligibility'
Hindi: 'EMI कैलकुलेटर' replaces 'EMI Calculator' nav link
Hindi: 'लोन ब्राउज़ करें' replaces 'Browse Loans' nav link
Language stored in localStorage as 'rinkosh_language'
Hindi persists after full page reload (still shows पात्रता जांचें)
Toggle back to EN works (restores 'Check my eligibility')
critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext.js fires PUT /api/user/language for guest users which returns 401 — handled by try/catch with console.debug, so functionally fine, but creates noise in console. Consider checking auth state before issuing the call.
LandingPage.js is approaching 700 lines (673) — consider splitting Hero, EMI Calculator, TrustCards, FounderStory, BrowseLoans into separate components for maintainability.
Scroll-spy uses IntersectionObserver which is correct; verify rootMargin tuning if false-positives appear with very small section heights.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 UI polish prompts verified, 24/25 assertions PASS; 1 failure was a flawed selector check, not a defect)

test_credentials: Not needed - public landing page only. Available in /app/memory/test_credentials.md if auth flow needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 — Landing Page UI polish (5-prompt batch) is fully verified. All sticky navbar, scroll-spy highlighting, solid CTA backgrounds, amber border, 3-col trust cards, 2-col founder story on cream bg, full Hindi mapping, anchor-scroll, and logo-to-top work as specified. No bugs found. Next agent can focus on other pages or new features.
